description: A simple omelette packed with vegetables.

title: Kuning Beef with Corn
description: A simple and delicious Indonesian-inspired Beef dish cooked in turmeric yellow sauce with fresh Corn.
instructions: Prepare and clean the Beef and Corn.
Sauté the aromatics (Turmeric, Garlic) in oil until fragrant.
Add the Beef and cook until partially done.
Add the Corn and the remaining seasonings.
Stir-fry or simmer until everything is perfectly cooked.
Serve hot with warm rice.

Sauté the aromatics (Garlic, Shallot) in oil until fragrant.
Add the Tempeh and cook until partially done.

Stir-fry or simmer until everything is perfectly cooked.
Serve hot with warm rice.
